entries.title: Professional Summary
bullets: 16+ years building and scaling enterprise web and cloud-native systems.
Hands-on leader across full stack, DevOps, cloud, and AI-driven platforms.
Delivered end-to-end systems from architecture to production at scale.
Led engineering teams up to 14, owning architecture, delivery, and mentoring.
Founder/CTO experience focused on product thinking and system design.

entries.AI: LLM API, RAG, Multi Agent Orchestration, Function calling, AI tooling, Token optimization, Caching & fallback strategies, Structured outputs (JSON reliability), Local LLM, LM Studio
entries.Application Stack: Node.js, Express, GraphQL, WebSocket, JWT, Auth0, Microservices, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Mongoose, Sequelize, TypeScript, React, Web Components, SPA, GraphQL, Apollo, Ant Design, Tailwind CSS, Vite, AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, ECS, EKS, ECR, RDS, Route53), Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, CDK, Pulumi, GitLab CI/CD, NX Monorepo, Nginx

bullets: Contributed to large-scale, high-traffic product experiences.

entries.title: Syngenta
entries.subtitle: Technical Manager / Architect
bullets: Built engineering team and established technical culture.
Delivered Node.js/Fastify microservices.
Implemented Terraform/Pulumi infrastructure.

entries.title: Rivigo
entries.subtitle: Principal Engineer
bullets: Led and mentored a 12-member engineering team, owning architecture, delivery, and hiring.
Implemented CI/CD, Docker, Ansible, and performance optimization initiatives to improve scalability and reliability.
Drove frontend modernization with reusable components, multilingual support, theming, and Headless CMS solutions.

bullets: Built a UPI-based mobile payment platform from scratch.

entries.title: Unicommerce

bullets: Architected and built the complete SPA frontend from scratch.
Created reusable UI architecture. Developed internal tooling and framework.
Built and mentored a six-member frontend team.

entries.title: Clickable / Syncapse

bullets: Migrated legacy product to a modern SPA.
Implemented responsive UI and modular architecture.
Received three promotions within 17 months.

Managed IITD-LUG community supporting FOSS initiatives.
